# @cloud/ui - Documentation for LLMs

> `@cloud/ui` is the shared React design-system package for Cloud applications. It provides accessible UI primitives, business-oriented recipes, page layouts, list filtering, charts, themes, localization messages, and semantic Tailwind CSS tokens for consistent operational interfaces.

This index is for  AI agents writing business application UI. Consume public package exports, reuse existing components before composing new ones, and do not import `packages/ui/src/**` internals from application code.

## Get Started

- [Package manifest](package.json): Public export map, runtime dependencies, peer dependencies, and the package type-check command.
- [Root exports](src/index.ts): Preferred `@cloud/ui` entry for UI components, layouts, list filters, hooks, theme helpers, sidebar state, and `cn`.
- [UI component exports](src/components/ui/index.ts): Public `@cloud/ui/components/ui` entry for primitives and composed UI recipes.
- [Layout exports](src/components/layout/index.ts): Public `@cloud/ui/components/layout` entry for application shell and page-layout components.
- [Chart exports](src/components/chart/index.ts): Public `@cloud/ui/components/chart` entry for themed Recharts composition; import charts from this subpath rather than from the root barrel or `recharts`.
- [List-filter exports](src/components/list-filter/index.ts): Public list filtering family, also re-exported from `@cloud/ui`.
- [Global styles](docs/get-started/global-styles.md): Apply the shared CSS entries once to load Tailwind, fonts, semantic tokens, dark mode, component defaults, and base styles.
- [Component defaults](src/components/styles/component-defaults.css): Import `@cloud/ui/component-defaults.css` before `@cloud/ui/globals.css` for shared component-level defaults.
- [Theme provider](src/lib/theme.tsx): `ThemeProvider`, `useTheme`, and the light or dark theme contract.
- [Class name utility](src/lib/utils.ts): Use `cn` to merge conditional Tailwind classes without conflicting utilities.
- [Infinite-scroll hook](src/lib/use-infinite-scroll.ts): Use `useInfiniteScroll` to load incremental results from an observed sentinel.
- [List-filter hook](src/lib/use-list-filters.ts): Use `useListFilters` to manage separate draft and applied filter state.
- [Responsive hook](src/lib/use-is-mobile.ts): Use `useIsMobile` when behavior, rather than CSS layout alone, must respond to the mobile breakpoint.
- [Sidebar state](src/lib/sidebar.tsx): Use `SidebarProvider` and `useSidebar` to coordinate expanded, collapsed, and mobile navigation state.
- [Sidebar cookie](src/lib/sidebar-cookie.ts): Use `SIDEBAR_COOKIE` when server and client code must share the persisted sidebar-state key.
- [English messages](messages/en.json): Default English strings used by localized UI components.
- [Simplified Chinese messages](messages/zh-CN.json): Default Simplified Chinese strings used by localized UI components.
- [Japanese messages](messages/ja.json): Default Japanese strings used by localized UI components.

## Components

- [Accordion](src/components/ui/primitives/accordion.tsx): Show related content in independently expandable sections.
- [Action footer](src/components/layout/action-footer.tsx): Place persistent cancel, back, and submit actions at the bottom of a task surface.
- [Advanced filter](src/components/list-filter/advanced-filter-sheet.tsx): Compose grouped fields in a sheet for filters that do not fit the quick filter bar.
- [Advanced filter button](src/components/list-filter/advanced-filter-button.tsx): Open advanced filtering and indicate the number of active advanced conditions.
- [Alert](src/components/ui/primitives/alert.tsx): Communicate inline information, success, warnings, or errors with optional actions.
- [Alert dialog](src/components/ui/primitives/alert-dialog.tsx): Require explicit confirmation before a consequential action.
- [App header](src/components/layout/app-header.tsx): Render the persistent application header and its navigation or action slots.
- [Aspect ratio](src/components/ui/primitives/aspect-ratio.tsx): Keep media or embedded content at a stable width-to-height ratio.
- [Avatar](src/components/ui/primitives/avatar.tsx): Represent a person or entity with an image, fallback, or compact group.
- [Badge](src/components/ui/primitives/badge.tsx): Label status, severity, category, or compact metadata using semantic tones.
- [Breadcrumb](src/components/ui/primitives/breadcrumb.tsx): Compose a low-level hierarchical navigation trail.
- [Breadcrumbs](src/components/layout/breadcrumbs.tsx): Render application breadcrumbs from typed item data.
- [Button](src/components/ui/primitives/button.tsx): Trigger commands with standard variants, sizes, icons, loading behavior, and danger semantics.
- [Calendar](src/components/ui/primitives/calendar.tsx): Display a calendar grid for date selection.
- [Card](src/components/ui/primitives/card.tsx): Group related content with standard header, content, action, footer, padding, and elevation slots.
- [Carousel](src/components/ui/recipes/carousel.tsx): Navigate a horizontal sequence of panels or media with controls and dots.
- [Chart bar](src/components/chart/chart-bar.tsx): Render themed Recharts bars, including stacked shapes and per-cell color resolution.
- [Chart container](src/components/chart/chart.tsx): Provide chart configuration, responsive sizing, semantic series colors, and shared chart context.
- [Chart legend](src/components/chart/chart-legend.tsx): Render a themed legend for chart series.
- [Chart pie callout](src/components/chart/chart-pie-callout.tsx): Add readable labels and connector lines to pie or donut sectors.
- [Chart sparkline](src/components/chart/chart-sparkline.tsx): Show a compact trend visualization without full chart chrome.
- [Chart states](src/components/chart/chart-states.tsx): Render standard chart loading and empty states.
- [Chart tooltip](src/components/chart/chart-tooltip.tsx): Display themed values and series metadata on chart interaction.
- [Checkbox](src/components/ui/primitives/checkbox.tsx): Select one or more independent boolean options.
- [Collapsible](src/components/ui/primitives/collapsible.tsx): Show or hide one region from a trigger without accordion grouping.
- [Combobox](src/components/ui/recipes/combobox.tsx): Search and select an option from a larger collection.
- [Command](src/components/ui/recipes/command.tsx): Build searchable command menus and command dialogs.
- [Content header](src/components/layout/content-header.tsx): Head plain dashboard or settings content that does not use a resource-management page band.
- [Context menu](src/components/ui/primitives/context-menu.tsx): Present contextual actions from a secondary-click or equivalent trigger.
- [Date picker](src/components/ui/recipes/date-picker.tsx): Enter or select one localized date.
- [Date range picker](src/components/ui/recipes/date-range-picker.tsx): Select a localized date interval with optional presets.
- [Date-time picker](src/components/ui/recipes/date-time-picker.tsx): Select a date and time as one field.
- [Drawer](src/components/ui/primitives/drawer.tsx): Present a task or supplementary content in a gesture-friendly sliding panel.
- [Dropdown menu](src/components/ui/primitives/dropdown-menu.tsx): Group contextual commands, choices, and submenus under a trigger.
- [Dropzone](src/components/ui/primitives/dropzone.tsx): Accept dragged or selected files and render file rows with upload status.
- [Empty](src/components/ui/primitives/empty.tsx): Explain an empty or zero-results state and offer an optional recovery action.
- [Field](src/components/ui/primitives/field.tsx): Associate a form control with its label, hint, required state, and validation error.
- [Hover card](src/components/ui/primitives/hover-card.tsx): Reveal supplementary content when a trigger is hovered or focused.
- [Input](src/components/ui/primitives/input.tsx): Capture a single line of text with standard field styling and states.
- [Input group](src/components/ui/recipes/input-group.tsx): Combine an input or textarea with addons, text, and compact actions.
- [Input OTP](src/components/ui/primitives/input-otp.tsx): Capture a segmented one-time password or verification code.
- [Key value](src/components/ui/recipes/key-value.tsx): Display labeled resource properties in responsive definition grids.
- [Label](src/components/ui/primitives/label.tsx): Provide an accessible label for a form control.
- [Layout](src/components/layout/layout.tsx): Establish the application shell around sidebar, header, and scrollable content.
- [List applied filters](src/components/list-filter/applied-filters.tsx): Display the currently applied filter chips and clear action.
- [List condition band](src/components/list-filter/list-condition-band.tsx): Arrange quick filters, advanced filtering, and applied filter feedback.
- [List filter chip](src/components/list-filter/filter-chip.tsx): Represent one removable applied filter.
- [List search input](src/components/list-filter/search-input.tsx): Capture and submit free-text list search using shared behavior.
- [List summary bar](src/components/list-filter/list-summary-bar.tsx): Show result counts and low-chrome list actions above a table.
- [Load more](src/components/ui/recipes/load-more.tsx): Request another page of results in incremental-loading interfaces.
- [Log console](src/components/ui/recipes/log-console.tsx): Present timestamped, leveled log lines in a dense operational console.
- [Menubar](src/components/ui/primitives/menubar.tsx): Build a persistent application-style command menu bar.
- [Modal](src/components/ui/primitives/modal.tsx): Focus the user on a bounded task while keeping the underlying page visible.
- [Navigation menu](src/components/ui/primitives/navigation-menu.tsx): Build structured navigation with expandable content panels.
- [Object tile](src/components/ui/primitives/object-tile.tsx): Show a selectable or actionable entity with compact supporting metadata.
- [Page body](src/components/layout/page-body.tsx): Own page-level padding, width, and vertical spacing inside the application scroll area.
- [Page header](src/components/layout/page-header.tsx): Head resource list and create pages with title, description, and actions.
- [Page header band](src/components/layout/page-header-band.tsx): Head resource detail pages with navigation, metadata, actions, and optional tabs.
- [Pagination](src/components/ui/recipes/pagination.tsx): Navigate a collection when only previous, next, and page controls are needed.
- [Popover](src/components/ui/primitives/popover.tsx): Display contextual information or lightweight controls anchored to a trigger.
- [Progress](src/components/ui/primitives/progress.tsx): Communicate known operation completion with semantic tone and labels.
- [Radio group](src/components/ui/primitives/radio-group.tsx): Select exactly one option from a visible set.
- [Resizable panels](src/components/ui/primitives/resizable.tsx): Divide a workspace into user-resizable regions.
- [Rich pagination](src/components/ui/recipes/rich-pagination.tsx): Navigate server-paginated collections with range, page size, and total count.
- [Scroll area](src/components/ui/primitives/scroll-area.tsx): Provide a styled overflow region with optional custom scrollbars.
- [Select](src/components/ui/primitives/select.tsx): Choose one option from a compact dropdown list.
- [Semantic tone](src/components/ui/_tone.ts): Share the neutral, success, warning, error, and info vocabulary across status-bearing components.
- [Separator](src/components/ui/primitives/separator.tsx): Visually or semantically divide adjacent content.
- [Sheet](src/components/ui/primitives/sheet.tsx): Open supplementary controls or content from an edge of the viewport.
- [Sidebar](src/components/layout/sidebar.tsx): Render grouped, nested application navigation from typed sections.
- [Sidebar trigger](src/components/layout/sidebar-trigger.tsx): Toggle the shared sidebar from a compact icon control.
- [Skeleton](src/components/ui/primitives/skeleton.tsx): Reserve layout while content is loading.
- [Slider](src/components/ui/primitives/slider.tsx): Select a numeric value or range along a track.
- [Spinner](src/components/ui/primitives/spinner.tsx): Indicate a compact indeterminate operation in progress.
- [Stat card](src/components/ui/recipes/stat-card.tsx): Present a key metric, trend, and supporting description.
- [Status card](src/components/ui/recipes/status-card.tsx): Summarize the current state of a resource or process with semantic emphasis.
- [Step indicator](src/components/ui/recipes/step-indicator.tsx): Show progress through a fixed sequence of task steps.
- [Stepper](src/components/ui/recipes/stepper.tsx): Adjust a numeric value with increment and decrement controls.
- [Switch](src/components/ui/primitives/switch.tsx): Toggle a setting that takes effect immediately.
- [Table](src/components/ui/recipes/table.tsx): Render typed business data with sorting, density, selection, sticky headers, and row actions.
- [Tabs](src/components/ui/primitives/tabs.tsx): Switch between peer content sections within the same surface.
- [Textarea](src/components/ui/primitives/textarea.tsx): Capture multi-line plain text with standard states.
- [Theme toggle](src/components/ui/primitives/theme-toggle.tsx): Switch among the supported visual themes.
- [Time picker](src/components/ui/recipes/time-picker.tsx): Enter or select a localized time value.
- [Timeline](src/components/ui/recipes/timeline.tsx): Present events, actors, times, and statuses in chronological order.
- [Toast](src/components/ui/primitives/sonner.tsx): Announce transient operation feedback through `Toaster` and `toast`.
- [Toggle](src/components/ui/primitives/toggle.tsx): Represent one pressed or selected control with standard button behavior.
- [Toggle controls](src/components/ui/recipes/toggles.tsx): Render checkbox, radio, and switch choices as richer selectable rows.
- [Toggle group](src/components/ui/primitives/toggle-group.tsx): Select one or more values from a compact group of toggles.
- [Tooltip](src/components/ui/primitives/tooltip.tsx): Explain an unfamiliar control on hover or keyboard focus.
- [Virtual table](src/components/ui/recipes/virtual-table.tsx): Render large typed datasets efficiently with row virtualization.

## Patterns

- [List page](patterns/list-page.md): Standard collection page with a page header, filter band, applied chips, summary bar, typed table, empty state, and rich pagination.
- [Advanced filtering](patterns/advanced-filtering.md): Right-side filter sheet for fields that do not fit the quick bar, with deferred apply and applied-filter chips.
- [Create form](patterns/create-form.md): Single-step create flow for independent fields using a page header, section cards, validation fields, and persistent actions.
- [Create wizard](patterns/create-wizard.md): Multi-step create flow for staged, branching, review, or externally processed tasks.
- [Detail page](patterns/detail-page.md): Resource detail page with a header band, tabs, key-value overview, related sections, metadata, and permission-aware actions.
- [Data visualization](patterns/data-visualization.md): Chart composition through the themed `@cloud/ui/components/chart` surface, semantic token colors, and standard chart states.
- [Action weight](patterns/action-weight.md): Button variant and action-hierarchy rules based on the slot where the action appears.
- [Empty states](patterns/empty-states.md): Distinguish first-run empty, filtered zero-results, and no-access states with appropriate recovery actions.
- [Errors and validation](patterns/errors-and-validation.md): Error-code protocol, validation boundaries, centralized handling, and the UI surfaces where failures appear.
- [Interactive surfaces](patterns/interactive-surfaces.md): Hover, selected, navigational, selectable, row-action, and clickable-card interaction rules.
- [Permission gating](patterns/permission-gating.md): Client and server access gates, typed permission codes, effective permissions, and UX behavior for unavailable actions.
- [Side navigation](patterns/side-navigation.md): Sidebar projection from module manifests and effective permissions, including menu levels, icons, ordering, and accessibility.
- [Timestamps](patterns/timestamps.md): Store integer seconds, choose render and input edges deliberately, and format absolute or relative times consistently.
- [Portal page rules](../../.claude/team-rule/coding-rules/ui_ui-and-pages.md): Binding page composition, density, accessibility, action hierarchy, lists, forms, details, color, and typography guidance.

## Demos

- [List page demo](docs/examples/list-page.tsx): Compilable style skeleton for a standard resource list.
- [Advanced-filter list demo](docs/examples/list-page-advanced-filter.tsx): Compilable style skeleton for a resource list with advanced filters.
- [Create form demo](docs/examples/create-form.tsx): Compilable style skeleton for a single-page create flow.
- [Create wizard demo](docs/examples/create-wizard.tsx): Compilable style skeleton for a staged create flow.
- [Detail page demo](docs/examples/detail-page.tsx): Compilable style skeleton for a resource detail page.
- [Charts demo](docs/examples/charts.tsx): Compilable usage reference for the themed chart kit.

## Foundations

- [Design tokens](foundations/design-tokens.md): Connect CSS variables, Tailwind utilities, and component props, and select tokens by semantic intent.
- [Colors](foundations/colors.md): Apply surface, content, line, status, category, and chart colors without hardcoded values.
- [Spacing and sizing](foundations/spacing.md): Choose shared spacing, control sizes, container widths, breakpoints, and component-owned dimensions.
- [Typography](foundations/typography.md): Use Geist, the type scale, semantic font roles, weights, and numeric alignment consistently.
- [Elevation](foundations/elevation.md): Apply the shadow ladder, Card elevation, overlay depth, and focus treatment according to interaction depth.
- [Theming](foundations/theming.md): Activate light or dark tokens and coordinate DOM selectors with React theme state.
- [Motion](foundations/motion.md): Use shared durations and easing while preserving reduced-motion behavior.
- [Responsive layout](foundations/responsive-layout.md): Choose viewport breakpoints, container-responsive composition, auto-fit grids, or behavior-only mobile detection.
- [Accessibility](foundations/accessibility.md): Preserve labels, keyboard interaction, focus, ARIA semantics, feedback, and reduced-motion support.
- [Page layout](foundations/page-layout.md): Compose application shells and list, create, detail, dashboard, and settings pages from shared layout primitives.

## Code Snippets

- [List page source](docs/examples/list-page.tsx): Copy and adapt the standard list composition.
- [Advanced-filter list source](docs/examples/list-page-advanced-filter.tsx): Copy and adapt the advanced filtering composition.
- [Create form source](docs/examples/create-form.tsx): Copy and adapt the single-page create composition.
- [Create wizard source](docs/examples/create-wizard.tsx): Copy and adapt the staged create composition.
- [Detail page source](docs/examples/detail-page.tsx): Copy and adapt the resource detail composition.
- [Chart source](docs/examples/charts.tsx): Copy and adapt themed chart compositions without importing Recharts directly.
